member.summary: Returns User Name if logged on, UNKNOWN if not

member.summary: Returns UserId if logged on, empty if not

member.summary: Returns true if user is in Admin Role, false if not or not logged in

member.summary: Determines whether the specified HTTP request is an AJAX request.
member.returns: true if the specified HTTP request is an AJAX request; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:CheckListApp.API._BaseController.ShowAllModelStateErrors(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.ModelBinding.ModelStateDictionary)
member.summary: Gets a list of errors in the model state and combines them into one simple string. Very useful for debugging if you get an error in your model, but you are not displaying the field on the screen so you don't know what it is.
member.returns: List of errors in one string.
